title: castanopsis sempervirens
intro: Castanopsis sempervirens, also known as the Taiwan chinquapin, is a species of evergreen tree native to Taiwan and southern China. It is a member of the beech family and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Castanopsis sempervirens include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and protecting against infections due to its antimicrobial properties. Castanopsis sempervirens is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and its extracts are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
